skill.name: explore
skill.tagline: Settle every unknown by oracle — world, human, or experiment.
skill.shortSummary: Route each open question to its rightful source — research, interview, or experiment — so discussions settle on evidence and rulings instead of assumptions.
skill.fullSummary: Explore classifies every open unknown into one of three sources: WORLD-owned questions go to parallel research subagents, HUMAN-owned questions go to targeted interviews, and NOBODY-owned questions go to experiments. The conversation continues while research runs, then reports once with validated, sourced briefs — keeping discussions grounded in evidence and explicit rulings rather than silent assumptions.

highlights.title: Three-Source Oracle Routing
highlights.description: Every unknown is classified as world, human, or nobody-owned, then settled by its matching source — research, interview, or experiment — so no question is silently assumed or misrouted.

highlights.title: Eager Parallel Research
highlights.description: Background Explore subagents launch per unknown with WebSearch grounding, run in parallel while the conversation continues, and report back together as compact, validated briefs with dated sources.

highlights.title: Rationed Human Interviews
highlights.description: HUMAN-owned unknowns go through AskUserQuestion one at a time, each carrying a recommended answer and reason, with roughly 4-6 questions per session and forks batched when independent.

highlights.title: Validated, Sourced Briefs
highlights.description: Every research brief carries claims, evidence, dated sources, conflicts, and a confidence line. Stale facts are discarded and conflicts resolved by authority and recency before a ruling is made.

steps.name: Announce and Classify
steps.description: Announce the skill, then classify each open unknown by owner.
steps.details: At the start, declare the skill is active. For each unknown that surfaces, decide whether the world, the human, or nobody holds the answer.

steps.name: Spawn Parallel Research
steps.description: Launch one Explore subagent per WORLD-owned unknown, in parallel.
steps.details: Send multiple tool calls in one message, each grounded with WebSearch and carrying the full response contract and required brief template.

steps.name: Wait and Validate Briefs
steps.description: Wait for all explorers, then validate every brief once.
steps.details: Never report partial; wait for every spawned explorer. Check source credibility, discard stale facts, resolve conflicts by authority and recency.

steps.name: Interview the Human
steps.description: Ask one decision-changing HUMAN-owned question at a time.
steps.details: Use AskUserQuestion with a recommended answer and reason, state the settled ruling explicitly, and carry it into the current task before the next question.

steps.name: Dispatch and Integrate
steps.description: Send NOBODY-owned unknowns to the experiment skill and carry rulings forward.
steps.details: Dispatch attune:experiment for unknowns no one knows yet. Treat each outcome as evidence, let the user rule on it, and fold the ruling into the work at hand.
